en: The elder to the beloved Gaius, whom I love in truth.
zh: 我這作長老的寫信給親愛的該猶，就是我在真理中所愛的。

en: Beloved, I pray that all may go well with you and that you may be in good health, as it goes well with your soul.
zh: 親愛的，我祝你凡事亨通，身體健壯，正如你的靈魂安泰一樣。

en: For I rejoiced greatly when the brothers came and testified to your truth, as indeed you are walking in the truth.
zh: 有些弟兄來到，證實你心中存有真理，就是你按真理行事，我就非常欣慰。

en: I have no greater joy than to hear that my children are walking in the truth.
zh: 我聽見我的兒女按真理行事，我的喜樂沒有比這更大的了。

en: Beloved, it is a faithful thing you do in all your efforts for these brothers, strangers as they are,
zh: 親愛的，你向弟兄所行的，特別是向外地來的弟兄所行的，都是出於忠心。

en: who testified to your love before the church. You will do well to send them on their journey in a manner worthy of God.
zh: 他們在教會面前證實了你的愛；你照著 神所喜悅的，資助他們的旅程，這樣是好的。

en: For they have gone out for the sake of the name, accepting nothing from the Gentiles.
zh: 因為他們為主的名出外，並沒有從教外人接受甚麼。

en: Therefore we ought to support people like these, that we may be fellow workers for the truth.
zh: 所以我們應當接待這樣的人，好讓我們為了真理成為同工。

en: I have written something to the church, but Diotrephes, who likes to put himself first, does not acknowledge our authority.
zh: 我曾經略略寫信給你那裡的教會，但他們中間那好作領袖的丟特腓不接待我們。

en: So if I come, I will bring up what he is doing, talking wicked nonsense against us. And not content with that, he refuses to welcome the brothers, and also stops those who want to and puts them out of the church.
zh: 因此，我來的時候，必要提起他所作的事，就是他用惡言中傷我們；這還不夠，他不但不接待弟兄，還要阻止那些想要接待的人，甚至把他們趕出教會。

en: Beloved, do not imitate evil but imitate good. Whoever does good is from God; whoever does evil has not seen God.
zh: 親愛的，不要效法惡，應該效法善。行善的屬於 神，作惡的沒有見過 神。

en: Demetrius has received a good testimony from everyone, and from the truth itself. We also add our testimony, and you know that our testimony is true.
zh: 低米丟行善，有眾人為他作證，真理本身也為他作證。我們也為他作證，你知道我們的見證是真的。

en: I had much to write to you, but I would rather not write with pen and ink.
zh: 我還有許多話要寫給你，可是我不願借用筆墨。

en: I hope to see you soon, and we will talk face to face.
zh: 我盼望很快就見到你，當面談談。

en: Peace be to you. The friends greet you. Greet the friends, every one of them.
zh: 願你平安。這裡的朋友都問候你。請你一一提名問候你那裡的朋友。
